name: proc_creation_win_wget_download_susp_locations
raw_query: any where (process.executable:"*\\wget.exe" or process.pe.original_file_name:"wget.exe") and process.command_line:"SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['://[0-9]{1,3}\\.[0-9]{1,3}\\.[0-9]{1,3}\\.[0-9]{1,3}']), flags=set())" and process.command_line:"*http*" and (process.command_line like~ ("SigmaRegularExpression(regexp=SigmaString(['\\s-O\\s']), flags=set())", "*--output-document*")) and ((process.command_line like~ ("*:\\PerfLogs\\*", "*:\\Temp\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Help\\*", "*:\\Windows\\Temp\\*", "*\\Temporary Internet*")) or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favorites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Favourites\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Contacts\\*") or (process.command_line:"*:\\Users\\*" and process.command_line:"*\\Pictures\\*"))
